content:
# Parallax Phenomenon

**Summary**: The apparent change in the position of an object based on the angle of observation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] utilized the parallax phenomenon to identify and remove obstacles (sand dunes) from seismic data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] Used as the conceptual basis for removing sand dune noise from seismic data.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] Conceptual application to signal processing.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The parallax-based approach successfully removed the obstacle by identifying it as a foreground layer that could be bypassed using multiple views/data points. ([[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024, p. 82]])
